title: tigridia estelae
intro: Tigridia estelae, also known as the Mexican flameflower or Mexican firecracker, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae. It is traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Tigridia estelae is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
